subject: Fix dmaap-dr-prov deployment failing
commit_message:
Fix dmaap-dr-prov deployment failing

imagePullSecrets was not correctly indented and thus creds were not
read.

Change-Id: Ib91d0b01450a09a4897339ba3c4c5328d296bbce
Issue-ID: OOM-1559
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm/1418/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/oom-master-verify-helm/1418

Patch Set 1:

see my comments for dmaap - could be same red-herring - it is just an image pull timing issue - see TSC-79

looks good - can't auth the gerrit review - I did start seeing this in casablanca recently  - but master is fine - are you sure the auth issue is secondary to the pull delay on the images

the thing is that our mirror mandates login and I suspect the "official" to not really mandate it.

I'm very confident that the login part is the issue in my case (I've also experienced the poor internet speed of lfn nexus and it's not the same)
